texto: I live in Brooklyn, and I love all the hipsters and all the artisanal bacon you can get here now. I consider New York my home, and L.A. a place that I go. I always say I go with an empty sack and try to fill it with as much money as possible to bring back to New York.
explicacao: Citação de Julie White sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I live in Brooklyn, and I love all the hipsters and all the artisanal bacon you can get here now.…” articula negocios, love, money em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como money e live.

frase_original: I live in Brooklyn, and I love all the hipsters and all the artisanal bacon you can get here now. I consider New York my home, and L.A. a place that I go. I always say I go with an empty sack and try to fill it with as much money as possible to bring back to New York.
